_schema: Locked-in animal routes per location. Full-precision floats from the v2 / wp64 summary JSONs — do not round, the route is sensitive to lat/lon snap-to-nearest-node. v2 of this file (S163 post-feedback) bumps n_waypoints 32 → 64 and pins template to ELE-Q07 at both locations because the denser waypoint sampling lets each leg get 4-6 sample points along the outline, forcing Dijkstra to dive into every leg-tip area instead of hopping over them.

router._notes: revisit_penalty_m=0 lets each leg/trunk splice loop trace as a clean out-and-back. n_waypoints=64 (was 32) makes each leg get multiple waypoint hits so the router has to trace through the tip, not skip over it. beta=6 tightens the per-leg corridor around the template line. See lessons_elephant_lockin_config.md for the override-Optuna pattern.

search._notes: Length penalty off; rotation clipped near canonical orientation so the elephant doesn't end up on its side. Routes are ~60 km — long, but recognisable anatomy was the priority per user direction.
